faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Mineola?
faqs.answer: Mineola properties most commonly experience German cockroach infestations in kitchens and bathrooms, followed by American cockroaches in basements and crawl spaces. We also occasionally treat Oriental cockroaches and brown-banded roaches in residential and commercial buildings throughout the area.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your cockroach extermination services?
faqs.answer: Yes! We stand behind our work with a comprehensive service guarantee. If cockroaches return within our warranty period, we'll re-treat your Mineola property at no additional cost. We also provide follow-up inspections to ensure complete elimination.
